modification_notice: Extracted complete Simplified Chinese sentences from the checksum-pinned OSHA PDF, excluded URLs, phone and crisis-line instructions, email addresses, page furniture, images, logos, external organizations, and other third-party content, and added input-only provenance; no expected text or converter output was used.
known_biases: Official U.S. worker-fatality family guidance is not representative of ordinary Taiwan traffic.
Grief, investigation, worker-rights, and administrative language is intentionally concentrated.
Multi-column PDF layout and inline headings require input-only eligibility review.
External organizations, contact details, images, logos, and other third-party content are excluded.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
